user.title: Set up rain-vision-ha
user.description: Choose a discovered controller and enter the 6 digit device password.

error.device_not_found: The selected device is no longer visible. Scan again and retry.
error.no_devices_found: No supported Rain Vision controllers were found nearby.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device.
error.unsupported_device: This is not a supported CDC 6-zone firmware 5.0 device.

abort.no_devices_found: No supported Rain Vision controllers were found nearby. Keep the controller awake and retry.
abort.not_connectable: The Bluetooth device is not connectable.
abort.unsupported_device: This is not a supported CDC 6-zone device.

data.poll_window_enabled: Restrict polling to a time window

data_description.poll_window_enabled: When disabled, the device is polled around the clock.
data_description.poll_window_start: Start of the time range during which BLE polling is allowed.
data_description.poll_window_end: End of the time range. Can span midnight (e.g. 22:00 – 06:00).

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device.
